subject: [PATCH 2/8 RFC] mm/page_counter: use page_counter_stock in page_counter_try_charge

2026-04-10.patch_summary: This patch modifies the page_counter_try_charge function to take into account the stock of a page counter when attempting to charge pages. It first checks if there is enough stock available, and if so, charges from the stock without hierarchical charging. If not enough stock is available, it attempts to fulfill the charge request hierarchically while also filling up the stock. If this fails, it retries with the exact number of pages requested. Finally, if the greedy attempt succeeds, it tries to add any surplus pages to the stock.
